CONTENT.Club career: Matriciani made his first team debut for Schalke 04 in a 4–3 home win against Eintracht Frankfurt on 15 May 2021, coming on as a substitute in the 67th minute. He signed a professional contract with the club on 28 September 2021, lasting until 2024.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the FC Schalke 04 websiteHenning Matriciani at DFB (also available in German)Henning Matriciani at kicker (in German)Henning Matriciani at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Matriciani debuted for the German U-21 national team in a 0–0 draw against Romania on 28 March 2023, coming on as a substitute in the 76th minute.

SUMMARY: Henning Matriciani (born 14 March 2000) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or right-back for 2. Bundesliga club Schalke 04.
